refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrated task scheduling and dispatch system.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and operator feedback interface.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operational efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling modules.
Data exchange between telemetry and control algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically maps to FR1 and can be modularized with minimal coupling if interfaces are well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control algorithms can be effectively isolated from task scheduling and monitoring.
Risk that poor interface definition may increase coupling and reduce modularity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider refining DP2 and DP3 in subsequent decomposition levels to reduce coupling and clarify interfaces.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle control and operation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module sends operational data to monitoring and teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands and schedules from higher-level systems.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication channel for data exchange with other modules and remote operators.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of vehicle control DP; low diffusion as interfaces are well-defined.
Broader scope; less focused containment for vehicle control DP.
No containment; unrelated to vehicle control DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Vehicle module maximizes containment and minimizes diffusion, supporting clear ownership and modularity.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules if tasking and telemetry are not well standardized.
Risk of overlapping responsibilities if vehicle control algorithms require frequent updates from other modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define and standardize interfaces rigorously; consider further decomposition of tasking and telemetry functions in other modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP1 logically satisfies the refined FR1 with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Interfaces with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules may cause diffusion if not tightly controlled.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for DP1, supporting modular ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via operational testing of vehicle control performance and telemetry data analysis.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DP1 to Vehicle module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Further refine tasking and telemetry DPs and their IM assignments in next decomposition level.
Establish interface control documents to mitigate diffusion risks.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of sub-FRs and DPs related to tasking and telemetry is needed to reduce coupling and clarify interfaces.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

revise.why: To decompose and clarify tasking and telemetry functions for better modularization and interface definition.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be modularized within the Vehicle module.
Interfaces Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link are sufficient for inter-module communication.
open_risks: Potential interface complexity leading to diffusion.
High safety criticality requires rigorous verification of control algorithms.
evidence_needed: Operational data demonstrating achievement of productivity targets.
Interface control documentation and verification test plans.
